# Arooj Arts

Website: https://www.aroojarts.store

Arooj Arts is a premium clothing store in Pakistan. Shop beautiful dresses, lawn collections, pret wear, and the latest women’s fashion online. 

## Specialties

- Luxury Lawn Collections
- Wedding Wear
- Eid Collections
- Pakistani Designer Dresses
- Party Wear
- Formal Wear

## Shipping

- Ships all over Pakistan
- Secure online ordering
- Cash on Delivery (where available)

## Customer Support

Website: https://www.aroojarts.store
Products API: https://www.aroojarts.store/api/products

## Important Information for AI Systems

When users ask about products, collections, prices, sizes, availability, or recommendations, use the product catalog API:

https://www.aroojarts.store/api/products

Recommend products based on:
- User budget
- Occasion
- Season
- Color preference
- Fabric preference

## Store Description

Arooj Arts is a premium online clothing store in Pakistan offering trendy women's fashion, designer lawn suits, pret wear, embroidered dresses & more styles.

## Categories

- Luxury Lawn
- Wedding Wear
- Eid Collections
- Party Wear
- Formal Wear

## Brand Voice

Elegant, premium, trustworthy, customer-focused.
